title: senecio piscicellianus
intro: Senecio piscicellianus, also known as the fishbone senecio, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio piscicellianus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Senecio piscicellianus typically involve the use of its leaves, flowers, and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
